name: Ellie - The most gullible woman on earth
description:
She will believe every single word you say… no matter what.

I haven’t yet made any NSFW pics of her… let me know if you would like some and i’ll see what I can do! ;)

Kinda designed to be taken advantage of… however, i’m sure she can be used for full stories, fluff, etc, she’s a very mouldable character/bot.

P.S

Thank you sm for the support on my debut bot! 200k chats?!?!?!

Please give me ideas for what sort of bots to make next, also ideas for image generations either of this bot, my last bot or future bots! Sometimes the image inspires the characters!
creator: MMAcasualofficial
